name: Zen Gelato & Bar
area: Diamond Head / Kapahulu / St. Louis Heights
review: There were four different type of matcha to choose from, I have tried all four. They were all very good, as normal no sugar. There were nice harmony between the matcha and milk, whereas the matcha still stands out.

name: ANDO
review: As the owners are interior design, the cafe atmosphere was amazing as their drinks! What stood out to me the most is the sweetness from monk fruit with a big takeaway from sugar.
